creator: wdr@tdl.com
text:
How about this:

*** src/bin/hostname/hostname.1.old     Sun Aug 29 07:12:37 1999
--- src/bin/hostname/hostname.1 Mon Dec 20 18:46:18 1999
***************
*** 51,56 ****
--- 51,61 ----
  normally run at boot
  time.
  .Pp
+ The canonical way to define the hostname at boot time is with the
+ .Va hostname
+ variable in
+ .Pa /etc/rc.conf .
+ .Pp
  Options:
  .Bl -tag -width flag
  .It Fl s
***************
*** 58,64 ****
  name.
  .El
  .Sh SEE ALSO
! .Xr gethostname 3
  .Sh HISTORY
  The
  .Nm
--- 63,70 ----
  name.
  .El
  .Sh SEE ALSO
! .Xr gethostname 3 ,
! .Xr rc.conf 5
  .Sh HISTORY
  The
  .Nm
